rule.instruction: A 6-inch (15 cm) grid covering the wall. Within each square, not straight lines in either of four directions. Only one direction in each square but as many as desired, and at least one line in each square.

designs.title: flow grid, fine
designs.intent: fine grid; directions follow a flow -> large currents through the squares (R11 gold standard, Klee #13).

designs.title: flow grid, fine B
designs.intent: another flow seed — different current map (Klee #13).

designs.title: flow grid, swirl
designs.intent: high flow scale -> tighter swirling regions (Klee #13).

designs.title: random dir, fine
designs.intent: control: random direction per square — patchwork, no current (Klee #11).

designs.title: flow grid, soft broad
designs.intent: broad gentle current, lighter (a calmer option) (Klee #13, #7).

designs.title: flow grid, dense fine
designs.intent: dense fine flow — rich woven current (Klee #5, #13).

designs.title: flow grid, double swirl
designs.intent: very high flow scale -> multiple vortices (complex, Klee #13).

designs.title: flow grid, dense wildest
designs.intent: densest + wildest current — maximal organic energy (Klee #3, #5).
